hero.recraft_prompt_if_needed: Professional licensed electrician in uniform working on an electrical panel in a clean residential garage, safety gear visible, wires routed neatly, photorealistic, no text or logos, no visible brand names.
hero.caption_context: Family + experience is the brand — prefer a team or father-son photo if Bruce surfaces one. Otherwise clean 'at-work' shot with caption referencing 20+ years or family lineage.

gallery.context: Clean modern panel upgrade with labeled breakers. Caption 'Panel updates — code-compliant, labeled, inspected'.
Home theater or media room wiring (premium niche). Caption 'Home theater + media room — hidden runs, clean terminations'.
Motion-activated security or landscape lighting. Caption 'Security + landscape lighting — motion-triggered, weatherproof'.
Under-counter lighting, GFCI outlets, appliance circuit. Caption 'Kitchens — under-counter, GFCI, appliance-ready'.
Hardwired smoke + CO detector installation. Caption 'Safety — hardwired smoke + CO, professionally placed'.
Harrisons + sons together or at a job site. Caption names the family if identifiable — 'Three generations, one name on the truck'.

sections.context: Atlanta southwest / Cascade area residential; Unsplash OK

notes: Electrician vertical = trust signals matter more than before/after. Lean into family-business + 20-year history. The 'Harrison & Sons' name is the hook. If Bruce surfaces a family photo or father-son shot, that becomes the hero. Home theater wiring (gallery slot 2) is the premium residential lane — worth wiring prominently to attract higher-end customers.
